deadlines: within 5 business days after written notice
10 business days after receipt of such notice to cure the inaccuracy
obligations: Purchaser shall pay the Purchase Price of $12,500,000
Purchaser shall pay deposit of $1,250,000 no later than January 22, 2026
Purchaser shall pay balance of $11,250,000 at Closing by wire transfer
Purchaser shall deliver closing deliveries at or before Closing
Vendor shall cause Maplewood Technologies Ltd. to operate in ordinary course until Closing
Vendor shall provide due diligence information within 5 business days after written notice
Vendor shall indemnify Purchaser from losses arising from breach of representations and warranties
Guarantor unconditionally guarantees Purchaser's payment obligations up to the Purchase Price
Northgate Acquisitions Corp. shall deliver a certified resolution of the board of directors approving the transaction
Northgate Acquisitions Corp. shall deliver an executed officer's certificate confirming representations and warranties are true and correct as of the Closing Date
Northgate Acquisitions Corp. shall deliver evidence of financing satisfactory to the Vendor
Vendor agrees to sell all issued and outstanding shares of Maplewood Technologies Ltd.
Purchaser agrees to purchase all issued and outstanding shares of Maplewood Technologies Ltd.
The Vendor shall not be required to first pursue any remedy against the Purchaser before enforcing this guarantee against the Guarantor
conditions: representations and warranties of Vendor true and correct in all material respects as of Closing Date
no material adverse change with respect to business of Maplewood Technologies Ltd.
all regulatory approvals obtained on or before February 20, 2026
Vendor shall have delivered all closing documents under Article 5
Purchaser shall have paid deposit prior to Closing
transfers: A deposit of $1,250,000 shall be paid by the Purchaser to the Vendor's solicitors in trust
The balance of $11,250,000 shall be paid by the Purchaser to the Vendor at Closing by wire transfer of immediately available funds
